title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gnome-shell and gsettings-desktop-schemas bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gnome-shell is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: GNOME Shell acts as a compositing manager for the desktop, and displays both application windows and other objects. It provides core interface functions like switching windows, launching applications, and notifications. It takes advantage of the capabilities of modern graphics hardware and introduces innovative user interface concepts. full_text:
An update for gnome-shell is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

GNOME Shell acts as a compositing manager for the desktop, and displays both application windows and other objects. It provides core interface functions like switching windows, launching applications, and notifications. It takes advantage of the capabilities of modern graphics hardware and introduces innovative user interface concepts. Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Allow rebooting from GNOME lock screen [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-103967)  [RFE] Allow rebooting from GNOME lock screen [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-103982)
